name: Mixed Mushroom and Chinese Cabbage Spring Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and slice all mushrooms into 1/2-inch pieces.
2. Heat sesame oil in a large saute pan over medium heat. Add the sliced mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes until they are golden brown.
3. Stir in shallots, garlic, parsley, and ginger. Cook for another 6 to 8 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
6. Blanch cabbage leaves in boiling water for about 30 seconds, then immediately chill in ice water.
7. Dry the cooled cabbage leaves on paper towels.
8. Place about 1/8 of the mushroom filling in the center of each cabbage leaf. Fold the side and roll tightly to form a spring roll shape.
9. Serve with light soy sauce for dipping.
Yield: 4 servings
